'''âsh-d-th''' ('''kashadath''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:calender|calender]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-d-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:calender|calender]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-d-th
|-
! Lemma
| kashadath
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishadath|thishadath]] || [[word:jishadath|jishadath]] || [[word:shishadath|shishadath]] || [[word:kishadath|kishadath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushadath|thuthushadath]] || [[word:jujushadath|jujushadath]] || [[word:shushushadath|shushushadath]] || [[word:kukushadath|kukushadath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushadath|thushadath]] || [[word:jushadath|jushadath]] || [[word:shushadath|shushadath]] || [[word:kushadath|kushadath]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thushadath|thushadath]] || [[word:jushadath|jushadath]] || [[word:shushadath|shushadath]] || [[word:kushadath|kushadath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theshadath|theshadath]] || [[word:jeshadath|jeshadath]] || [[word:sheshadath|sheshadath]] || [[word:keshadath|keshadath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoshadath|thothoshadath]] || [[word:jojoshadath|jojoshadath]] || [[word:shoshoshadath|shoshoshadath]] || [[word:kokoshadath|kokoshadath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoshadath|thoshadath]] || [[word:joshadath|joshadath]] || [[word:shoshadath|shoshadath]] || [[word:koshadath|koshadath]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshadath|thoshadath]] || [[word:joshadath|joshadath]] || [[word:shoshadath|shoshadath]] || [[word:koshadath|koshadath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠshadath|thĂŠshadath]] || [[word:jĂŠshadath|jĂŠshadath]] || [[word:shĂŠshadath|shĂŠshadath]] || [[word:kĂŠshadath|kĂŠshadath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathashadath|thathashadath]] || [[word:jajashadath|jajashadath]] || [[word:shashashadath|shashashadath]] || [[word:kakashadath|kakashadath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashadath|thashadath]] || [[word:jashadath|jashadath]] || [[word:shashadath|shashadath]] || [[word:kashadath|kashadath]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashadath|thashadath]] || [[word:jashadath|jashadath]] || [[word:shashadath|shashadath]] || [[word:kashadath|kashadath]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shashadath|shashadath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshashadath|goshashadath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishashadath|gokishashadath]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shashadathnĂŒ|shashadathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshashadathnknĂŒ|goshashadathnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishashadathnĂŒ|gokishashadathnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shashadathshĂ«|shashadathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshashadathnkshĂ«|goshashadathnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishashadathshĂ«|gokishashadathshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashadathro|shashadathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashadathnkro|goshashadathnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashadathro|gokishashadathro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shashadathmu|shashadathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashadathnkmu|goshashadathnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashadathmu|gokishashadathmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shashadathsher|shashadathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshashadathnksher|goshashadathnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishashadathsher|gokishashadathsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shashadathng|shashadathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshashadathnkng|goshashadathnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishashadathng|gokishashadathng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shashadathya|shashadathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshashadathnkya|goshashadathnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishashadathya|gokishashadathya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shashadathyam|shashadathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshashadathnkyam|goshashadathnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishashadathyam|gokishashadathyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashadathnĂŒshĂ«|shashadathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashadathnknĂŒshĂ«|goshashadathnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashadathnĂŒshĂ«|gokishashadathnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashadathnĂŒro|shashadathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashadathnknĂŒro|goshashadathnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashadathnĂŒro|gokishashadathnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashadathnĂŒmu|shashadathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashadathnknĂŒmu|goshashadathnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashadathnĂŒmu|gokishashadathnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashadathshĂ«nĂŒ|shashadathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashadathnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshashadathnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashadathshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishashadathshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashadathshĂ«ro|shashadathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashadathnkshĂ«ro|goshashadathnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashadathshĂ«ro|gokishashadathshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashadathshĂ«mu|shashadathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashadathnkshĂ«mu|goshashadathnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashadathshĂ«mu|gokishashadathshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashadathronĂŒ|shashadathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashadathnkronĂŒ|goshashadathnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashadathronĂŒ|gokishashadathronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashadathroshĂ«|shashadathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashadathnkroshĂ«|goshashadathnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashadathroshĂ«|gokishashadathroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashadathromu|shashadathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashadathnkromu|goshashadathnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashadathromu|gokishashadathromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashadathmunĂŒ|shashadathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashadathnkmunĂŒ|goshashadathnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashadathmunĂŒ|gokishashadathmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashadathmushĂ«|shashadathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashadathnkmushĂ«|goshashadathnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashadathmushĂ«|gokishashadathmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashadathmuro|shashadathmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashadathnkmuro|goshashadathnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashadathmuro|gokishashadathmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
